1 · #139 Code Quality
npm audit - zero critical/high vulnerabilities
Confirms that no known high or critical npm package vulnerabilities exist in the dependency tree.
 Jul 1, 11:43 AM
2 · #375 Code Quality
Pre-Flight - Database Security & Integrity Audit
Ensures the app ships with no database security gaps, no raw SQL string concatenation, correct dev/prod separation, and all schema changes tracked in version control.
 Jul 1, 11:43 AM
3 · #376 Code Quality
Pre-Flight - localStorage / sessionStorage Audit
Ensures no new or unapproved keys have been written to localStorage or sessionStorage. Only the approved keys below should exist - any addition must be intentional and documented.
 Jul 1, 11:43 AM
4 · #377 Code Quality
Pre-Flight - Code Quality Audit
Ensures the app ships without debug artifacts, unhandled async errors, missing UI states, or unbounded list queries. Catches issues that automated tests miss.
 Jul 1, 11:43 AM
5 · #378 Code Quality
Pre-Flight - Security Audit
Comprehensive security review to ensure the app cannot be hacked, exploited, or used to leak user data. Covers secrets, Electron hardening, XSS, authentication, API security, and supply chain.
 Jul 1, 11:43 AM
6 · #379 Code Quality
[AUTO] Admin files excluded from build — package.json config check
Verifies that package.json build.files contains exclusions for admin-only JS files (tests.js, deployment.js). If these exclusions are missing, those files will ship in the installer.
 Jul 1, 11:43 AM
7 · #380 Code Quality
[AUTO] Admin files absent from packaged build — runtime file check
In a packaged installer, confirms that tests.js and deployment.js are not present in the app bundle. In dev mode, skips gracefully (files are expected to exist).
 Jul 1, 11:43 AM
8 · #381 Code Quality
[AUTO] Help page version matches package.json version
Catches version drift: ensures the Help page “Version” display dynamically loads the correct version from Electron rather than a stale hardcoded string.
 Jul 1, 11:43 AM
9 · #382 Code Quality
Pre-Flight — Windows-specific behaviour checklist
Verifies Windows-specific behaviours that cannot be covered by the Mac test run: file paths, AppData storage, NSIS installer, Windows code signing, and auto-updater.
 Jul 1, 11:43 AM
▸Automatic (132) 132 Pass
Exec / #ID Category Title & Purpose Result Timestamp
10 · #1 Auth
Session persists after reload
Confirms the user remains authenticated after the app loads. If this fails, the login flow or session storage is broken.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
11 · #2 Auth
currentUser is set
Verifies the local currentUser object is properly populated. This object drives nearly all DB reads/writes - if missing, the entire app will malfunction.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
12 · #3 Auth
Supabase profile loaded
Checks that the user's Supabase profile row was fetched on startup. Role, org_id, and subscription data all live here - missing profile breaks teams, billing, and settings.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
13 · #4 Auth
Subscription status in memory
Ensures subscription_status is present on the in-memory Supabase profile object after login. This is the sole source of truth for feature gating - localStorage is intentionally not used to prevent client-side tampering.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
14 · #5 Auth
Onboarding - checkAndShowOnboarding gated by onboarding_completed
Confirms checkAndShowOnboarding() exists and does NOT show the onboarding modal when onboarding_completed is already true. This is the normal state for existing users.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
15 · #146 Auth
user_sessions row written on login
Confirms that a user_sessions row exists in Supabase for the current user after login.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
16 · #147 Auth
session_token matches sessionStorage
Confirms the session_token stored in Supabase matches what is stored in sessionStorage on this device.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
17 · #6 Database
Parameterized queries - no raw SQL string concatenation
Confirms all DB queries use Supabase JS client (parameterized) or SQLite prepared statements, preventing SQL injection.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
18 · #7 Database
Connection pooling - Supabase REST API used (pooling automatic)
Confirms app uses Supabase REST API (auto-pooled via PgBouncer) not a direct Postgres connection.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
19 · #8 Database
Non-root DB user - app uses authenticated role only
Confirms the app never uses the postgres superuser or service_role. All queries go through authenticated role with RLS enforced.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
20 · #127 Database
Migrations in version control - supabase/migrations/ folder exists
Confirms database migration files are tracked in version control, not applied manually without tracking.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
21 · #9 DB Schema
team_members - lockout columns exist in schema
Confirms the DB migration for the lockout system was applied. The columns locked, lock_at, and lock_notified_2day must exist on team_members or the entire lockout system silently fails.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
22 · #10 Navigation
Home page renders
Confirms the home page mounts correctly and the tips grid is present. A failure here indicates a rendering crash or missing DOM element on the default landing page.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM

Jumps page renders
Verifies the Jumps page loads and shows either jump columns or an empty-state placeholder. Catches rendering regressions in the core feature page.

Archive page renders
Confirms the Archive page mounts and its list container exists. Ensures users can always access their archived jumps.

Stats page renders

Account page renders

Help page - renderHelp() renders without error
Confirms the Help page renders its DOM content without throwing.

Profile first name displayed

Profile email displayed

Change password form exists

forceBackup function is defined

importJumps function is defined

Settings page shows Export and Import buttons

Import: valid backup JSON imports jumps correctly

Import: duplicate jump is skipped

Export: only personal, non-empty columns included

47 · #27 Settings
saveAccountPrefs is accessible
Confirms the account preferences save function is globally accessible. Without it, any settings change on the Account page would silently fail.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
48 · #28 Settings
Prefs persist to SQLite
Writes a preference change to the local SQLite DB and reads it back. Confirms the IPC write path is working so user settings actually survive app restarts.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
49 · #29 Settings
startPage pref saves and reads back
Specifically tests the startPage preference - the page the app opens to on launch. If this pref doesn't persist, the user's chosen start page resets every session.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
50 · #30 Settings
Theme pref persists via DB.savePrefs / getPrefs
Verifies that saving a theme preference writes to cache and reading it back returns the correct value. Theme persists across sessions via this prefs layer - a failure means the user's theme choice resets every restart.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
51 · #31 Jumps
DB.getActiveJumps returns array
Isolates the core data accessor for jumps. If this returns a non-array, every jump render and loop in the app will crash.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
52 · #32 Jumps
DB.getColumns returns array
Verifies the column data accessor works. Columns are required to display or add jumps - if this fails, the Jumps page will be empty or crash.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
53 · #33 Jumps
Add jump saves to DB
Tests the full create→read→delete lifecycle for a jump. Confirms DB.createJump persists correctly and DB.deleteJump removes it cleanly.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
54 · #34 Jumps
Archive jump removes from active
Confirms that archiving a jump correctly removes it from the active list. Catches bugs where archive doesn't persist or the active filter doesn't exclude archived items.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
55 · #35 Jumps
Hotkey not duplicated
Ensures no two jumps share a hotkey, which would cause unpredictable behavior when that key is pressed. Catches data corruption from imports or manual edits.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
56 · #36 Jumps
DB.updateJump persists field changes
Confirms that updateJump correctly writes name, URL, and description changes back to the in-memory cache (and SQLite). If this fails, jump edits via the Configure modal will silently discard user changes.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
57 · #37 Jumps
Jump favorite toggle persists
Confirms that marking a jump as a favorite (and unmarking it) correctly updates the in-memory cache. Favorites power the quick-access section - silent failure here would silently break it.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
58 · #38 Jumps
DB.incrementClick increments clickCount
Verifies that opening a jump via DB.incrementClick correctly increments clickCount in cache. Stats, sorting, and the top-used display all depend on this counter being accurate.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
59 · #39 Columns
Columns have unique IDs
Guards against duplicate column IDs which would cause jumps to appear in wrong columns or be overwritten during saves.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
60 · #40 Columns
Column order is sequential
Confirms column ordering is intact so the Jumps page renders columns in the correct left-to-right sequence. Catches issues after drag-reorder or bulk saves.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
61 · #41 Columns
At least one column exists
Ensures the user has a column set up, which is required for adding jumps. If zero columns exist, the Add Jump modal will fail silently.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
62 · #42 Columns
Visible columns count
Confirms at least one column is visible so the Jumps page is not blank. Catches cases where all columns were accidentally hidden.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
63 · #43 Columns
Column create / delete lifecycle
Tests the full create → verify → delete cycle for a column via the DB layer. Regressions here would prevent users from adding or removing columns entirely.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
64 · #44 Columns
Column drag-reorder persists order values
Confirms that shuffling column .order values via saveColumns correctly persists the new order in cache. Drag-and-drop reordering relies entirely on this - failure means the user's column order resets on reload.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
65 · #159 Columns
Add column: DB.createColumn persists new personal column
Confirms that creating a column via DB.createColumn persists it and it appears in DB.getColumns.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
66 · #160 Columns
Remove column: orphaned jumps are deleted on save
Confirms that when a personal column is removed, its jumps are also deleted (no orphan data).

DB.getArchivedJumps returns array
Verifies the archive data accessor is functional. A non-array return would crash the Archive page render loop.

Unarchive restores jump to active
Tests the full archive→unarchive round-trip. Confirms a jump removed from active can be fully restored, which is a key user-facing recovery action.

Archive page renders archived list
Confirms the Archive page mounts its list container in the DOM. Catches render failures that would leave users with a blank archive page.

Click log is array
Verifies the click log data accessor works. All stats charts depend on this - a non-array return would crash every chart on the Stats page.

71 · #49 Stats
Trial launches used is number
Confirms the trial launch counter is a valid number. This value gates free-tier access - if it's null or NaN the paywall logic will behave unpredictably.

72 · #50 Stats
Stats page renders charts
End-to-end check that the Stats page renders its full wrapper with chart content. Catches regressions in renderStats() or missing chart dependencies.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
73 · #51 Stats
DB.logClick records entry in click log
Confirms that logClick appends an entry to the in-memory click log for the correct user. Stats, charts, and the top-used jump list all derive from this log - silent failure here corrupts all usage analytics.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
74 · #52 Stats
ROI - hours saved calculation is correct
Validates the core ROI formula: lifetimeLaunches × timePerClick / 3600 = lifetimeHours (floor).
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
75 · #53 Stats
ROI - dollar value calculation is correct
Validates the dollar formula: (lifetimeLaunches × timePerClick / 3600) × dollarsPerHour.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
76 · #54 Subscription
Free tier limit check
Validates free-tier users haven't exceeded the launch limit. Catches cases where the counter is out of sync with what the paywall should enforce.

77 · #55 Subscription
showPaywall function exists
Confirms the paywall function is globally accessible. If missing, free-tier users could use the app indefinitely without ever seeing the upgrade prompt.

78 · #56 Subscription
Paid tier bypasses limit
Confirms paid subscribers are not blocked by the paywall on load. A failure here means paying customers are being incorrectly gated.

apply-pending-upgrade - returns applied:false when no pending row
Confirms apply-pending-upgrade gracefully returns { ok:true, applied:false } for a normal user with no pending upgrade row. This is the common-case path hit on every login.

check-member-lockouts - Edge Function reachable and returns ok:true

82 · #61 Paywall
Teams page - free tier renders with limit messaging (not a full paywall)

send-feedback - Edge Function returns ok:true

send-welcome - Edge Function returns ok:true

send-team-deleted - Edge Function returns ok:true

Teams page renders
Verifies the Teams page loads without error. A blank page here indicates renderTeams() is crashing or the user's role/org data is missing.

supabaseClient accessible
Confirms the Supabase client is initialized. Every team sharing, invite, and sync operation depends on this - if undefined, all cloud features fail silently.

89 · #70 Teams
Share column to test team → verified in Supabase
Confirms that sharing a column writes the correct rows to shared_columns and shared_jumps in Supabase. Tests the core data sync that makes jump sharing work for teams.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
90 · #71 Teams
Invite user to test team → pending status in Supabase
Tests that the invite creation flow correctly writes a pending invite row to Supabase. An invite email is only useful if the DB row is correct - this catches mismatches.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
91 · #72 Teams
Accept invitation → status updated to "accepted" in Supabase
Simulates a user accepting a team invite and verifies the DB status transitions from pending to accepted. If this fails, users who accept invites won't gain team access.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
92 · #73 Teams
Remove user from team → member row deleted in Supabase
Confirms the member removal path correctly deletes the team_members row from Supabase. If this fails, removed members retain access to shared jumps.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
93 · #75 Teams
Team join rejects wrong password
Confirms the server-side password verification correctly rejects an invalid password. If this fails, team access control is broken - anyone could join any team.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
94 · #76 Teams
New team - openCreateTeamModal() renders without error
Confirms the Create Team modal opens and renders its form fields without throwing.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
95 · #77 Teams
New team - direct Supabase insert creates team row and cleans up
Validates the full round-trip: insert a team row directly into Supabase (bypassing UI), confirm it exists, then delete it. Tests DB write access and schema correctness.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
96 · #120 Teams
verify-team-password - wrong password returns valid:false
Confirms verify-team-password correctly rejects a wrong password. If rejection works, the function is operating correctly - correct-password acceptance is implied.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
97 · #169 Teams
Role present in memory
Confirms the user's role is present on the in-memory Supabase profile object. Role gates org-owner vs team-member views - localStorage is intentionally not used to prevent client-side tampering.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
98 · #78 Shared Sync
Add jump to shared column → appears in Supabase shared_jumps
Verifies that creating a new jump in a shared column immediately pushes it to Supabase shared_jumps for team members to see.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
99 · #79 Shared Sync
Edit jump in shared column → Supabase shared_jumps updated
Verifies that editing a jump already in a shared column pushes the update to Supabase.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
100 · #80 Shared Sync
Delete jump from shared column → removed from Supabase shared_jumps
Verifies that deleting a jump from a shared column removes it from Supabase so team members no longer see it.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
101 · #81 Shared Sync
Move jump OUT of shared column → removed from Supabase shared_jumps
Verifies that moving a shared jump to a non-shared column removes it from Supabase.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
102 · #82 Shared Sync
Move jump INTO shared column → inserted into Supabase shared_jumps
Verifies that moving a personal jump into a shared column pushes it to Supabase.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
103 · #83 Shared Sync
Shared column rename updates Supabase shared_columns.name
Verifies that when an owner renames a shared column, the new name is pushed to Supabase shared_columns so members see the correct name on their next sync. This was a known bug fix - this test guards against regression.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
104 · #84 Shared Sync
syncSharedJumps runs without error
Validates that the core sync function completes without throwing, regardless of team membership state. A crash here would prevent all shared jump propagation.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
105 · #374 Shared Sync
Cleanup - purge ALL test artifacts from Supabase
Sweeps ALL stale test data from Supabase - not just the current run. Finds every team, shared_column, shared_jump, invite, and member row created by any previous test run using the __jk_test_* / __test_* naming convention, and deletes them. Also restores role elevated by test 69.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
106 · #85 Security
DevTools disabled in production build
Ensures DevTools are blocked in packaged builds so users cannot tamper with localStorage (subscription tier/status) or inspect internals.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
107 · #86 Security
All Supabase requests use authenticated session
Confirms that the supabaseClient has an active authenticated session before the app loads data. Unauthenticated data access should not be possible.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
108 · #87 Security
HTTPS enforced - Supabase URL uses HTTPS
Confirms that all Supabase API communication uses HTTPS, not plain HTTP.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
109 · #88 Security
CORS - Edge Functions not called with wildcard origin
Confirms that the app does not rely on wildcard CORS. Edge functions should be locked to jumpkit.app.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
110 · #89 Security
Input sanitization - esc() used for user-generated content
Confirms that user input rendered into the DOM is escaped to prevent XSS attacks.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
111 · #90 Security
Rate limiting - 429 returned on excessive requests (Edge Function config check)
Confirms that rate limiting is configured on Edge Functions. In-memory rate limiter returns 429 after threshold.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
112 · #91 Security
Password hashing - PBKDF2 used (not plain SHA-256)
Confirms that team passwords are hashed with PBKDF2 (strong KDF) and not plain SHA-256.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
113 · #92 Security
Auth tokens have expiry - JWT exp claim present
Confirms that the Supabase JWT session token has an expiry claim (exp) and has not expired.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
114 · #129 Security
No secret API keys in frontend code
Confirms that no service-role keys or secret tokens are exposed in the renderer. Only the safe anon key should be present.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
115 · #94 UI
Dark/light mode toggle works
Confirms the theme attribute is set to a valid value. An invalid or missing theme would cause the CSS variables to fall back incorrectly, breaking the entire visual design.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
116 · #95 UI
Toast function accessible
Verifies the Toast notification system is available. Save, delete, error, and feedback operations all call Toast - if missing, users get no feedback on their actions.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
117 · #96 UI
Modal function accessible
Confirms the Modal system is available globally. Add Jump, Configure Columns, Feedback, and team actions all use Modal - a missing definition would silently break all of them.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
118 · #97 UI
Sidebar nav has items
Ensures the sidebar navigation rendered all its buttons. Fewer than 5 nav items means a page is missing from the nav - users wouldn't be able to reach it.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
119 · #98 UI
CtxMenu is accessible
Confirms the context menu system is initialized. Right-clicking any jump relies on CtxMenu.show/hide - if missing, right-click actions (edit, archive, delete) are broken.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
120 · #99 UI
Jump context menu renders on right-click
Simulates a right-click on a jump and confirms the context menu appears with sufficient items. Directly tests the most common jump management interaction.

121 · #100 UI
Feedback modal - openFeedbackModal() renders without error
Confirms the feedback modal opens and renders its form fields without throwing.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
122 · #101 Code Quality
No production debug logging
Confirms development logging is not left active in production builds.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
123 · #102 Code Quality
Error handling on async operations - Supabase calls check error object
Confirms that async Supabase calls check the returned error object rather than silently swallowing failures.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
124 · #103 Code Quality
Loading and error states in UI - Toast system functional
Confirms that the Toast notification system (used for loading/error/success states) is present and operational.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
125 · #104 Code Quality
Pagination - list queries have reasonable limits
Warns if list queries fetch unbounded rows. At scale, unlimited queries can cause performance issues.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
126 · #106 Deployment
Firewall / infrastructure - Vercel and Supabase managed (no self-hosted server)
Confirms JumpKit has no self-hosted server that requires manual firewall configuration. Vercel and Supabase handle all infrastructure.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
127 · #107 Deployment
Process manager - N/A for Electron + Vercel + Supabase stack
Confirms no unmanaged background processes are running. For this stack, process management is handled by Vercel/Supabase/OS - PM2 is not required.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
128 · #108 Deployment
Auto-update IPC - onUpdateReady and installUpdate exposed in preload
Confirms preload.js exposes both update IPC bridges. If either is missing, the update banner will never show or the restart button will throw.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
129 · #109 Deployment
Auto-update banner - #updateBanner element exists in DOM and starts hidden
Confirms the update banner HTML element exists in app.html and is initially hidden. If it is missing, no update notification will ever appear.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
130 · #110 Deployment
Auto-update banner - shows when update-ready event fires
Confirms the app.js listener correctly shows #updateBanner when the update-ready IPC event fires. Tests the full renderer-side update notification path.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
131 · #113 Deployment
Export PDF - electronAPI.exportPDF is exposed in preload
Confirms the Electron preload correctly exposes electronAPI.exportPDF so the renderer can trigger PDF generation.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
132 · #140 Deployment
Environment variables - Supabase URL and anon key configured
Confirms that required environment variables (SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY) are set and non-empty. Edge Function secrets cannot be verified from client but client-side vars are checked.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
133 · #162 Deployment
Mac build icon is set to assets/icon.icns
Confirms the Electron build config specifies the correct .icns icon for macOS. An incorrect or missing icon means the installer and app will ship with the wrong icon.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
134 · #163 Deployment
Windows build icon is set to assets/icon.ico
Confirms the Electron build config specifies the correct .ico icon for Windows. Using a PNG instead of .ico degrades icon quality in Explorer, taskbar, and title bar.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
135 · #122 Maintenance
Auto-archive fires correctly and creates notification
Verifies that runAutoArchive() correctly identifies jumps unused past the threshold, archives them in SQLite, and creates an in-app notification. Confirms free-tier users are blocked.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
136 · #200 SQLite
SQLite available — not falling back to localStorage
Confirms better-sqlite3 is compiled for the current Electron ABI and the main process has an open DB connection. A failure here means every save operation is silently broken. Fix: run npx @electron/rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3 from the app directory.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
137 · #201 SQLite
Column write → SQLite round-trip
Verifies that DB.saveColumns actually persists to SQLite by writing a test column then immediately reading it back via the IPC layer (bypassing the in-memory cache). Catches ABI mismatch and write failures silently swallowed by fire-and-forget IPC.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
138 · #202 SQLite
Jump write → SQLite round-trip
Verifies that DB.createJump actually persists to SQLite by writing a test jump then reading it back via the IPC layer. Catches the exact bug where imports rendered in memory but vanished after logout because SQLite was not being written.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
139 · #203 SQLite
saveColumns IPC returns ok:true
Directly calls electronAPI.saveColumns and checks the return value. The import-after-logout bug was caused by this IPC returning {ok:false} silently. This test catches any regression where the SQLite save silently fails.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
140 · #204 SQLite
saveJump IPC returns ok:true
Directly calls electronAPI.saveJump and checks the return value. Catches silent IPC failures that cause jumps to persist in memory but not survive a logout/login cycle.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
141 · #205 SQLite
No orphan personal jumps in SQLite
Verifies that every personal active jump has a valid column ID that exists in SQLite. Orphan jumps cause the Jumps page to appear empty even when Home counts them. This was the final rendering symptom of the SQLite-unavailable bug.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM

send-cancellation - Edge Function returns ok:true

Automatically calls the send-account-exists Edge Function with the current user's email and confirms it returns { ok: true }. Verifies the function is deployed, reachable, and responds without error. Does NOT verify email delivery - check your inbox after running.

send-pending-upgrade - Edge Function returns ok:true
Automatically calls the send-pending-upgrade Edge Function with the current user email and confirms it returns { ok:true }. Verifies the function is deployed and reachable.

send-team-downgrade-alert - Edge Function returns ok:true (alert variant)

147 · #117 Email
send-team-downgrade-alert - Edge Function returns ok:true (warning variant)

148 · #118 Email
send-member-joined - Edge Function returns ok:true

149 · #119 Email
send-member-removed - Edge Function returns ok:true
Calls send-member-removed with the logged-in user as the removed member (test scenario), confirming the function is deployed, accepts the payload, and returns { ok:true }.

150 · #144 Email
waitlist-signup - Edge Function call + inbox verification
End-to-end test: automatically calls the waitlist-signup Edge Function and verifies a valid response, then asks you to confirm the email arrived in your inbox. If already on the waitlist (duplicate:true), auto-passes with no inbox check needed.

Calls exportStatsPDF() - the real app export function - to generate the actual ROI report PDF from live data. Human verifies the saved file looks correct.

Verifies that runCloudBackup() correctly blocks free-tier users, respects the auto-backup preference, saves a backup file via Electron IPC, and creates an in-app notification (success or failure). Also confirms the backup notification is NOT a modal - it goes silently to the notification bell.

153 · #124 Auth
Sign out clears session
Manually confirms that signing out fully ends the session and prevents access to the app without re-authenticating. Critical for security.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
154 · #148 Auth
Second device login is blocked
Confirms that attempting to log in from a second device while already logged in shows the session conflict modal and blocks entry.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
155 · #149 Auth
Force logout displaces original session
Confirms that when a second device force-logs-out the first, the first device eventually shows the displacement warning and redirects to login.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
156 · #125 Database
Supabase backups - verify plan supports backups
Reminds developer to verify that Supabase backups are configured. Free tier has no auto-backups; Pro tier includes daily backups.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
157 · #126 Database
Dev/Prod database separation - single project warning
Warns if dev and production share the same Supabase project, risking production data corruption during development.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
158 · #155 Account
Export then Import round-trip on new device
End-to-end confirmation that a user can export jumps from one device and import them on another, with all personal jumps transferred correctly.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
159 · #128 Jumps
Jump click launches URL or directory
Manually verifies the core user action - clicking a link jump opens the URL in the browser, and clicking a directory jump opens it in the file explorer.

160 · #161 Columns
Configure Columns - Add Column and Remove Column buttons
Confirms the Add Column and Remove Column (trash icon) UI flows work correctly in the Configure Columns modal.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
161 · #93 Subscription
Lemon Squeezy webhook upgrades subscription_status
End-to-end validation that a real Lemon Squeezy subscription_created webhook correctly sets subscription_status="active" and subscription_tier="core" in Supabase. This is the core billing flow - failure means paid users are not upgraded.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
162 · #130 Subscription
apply-pending-upgrade - applies upgrade for user who paid before creating account
Confirms apply-pending-upgrade applies the upgrade, deletes the pending row, and returns { ok:true, applied:true }. This flow handles the case where a user paid on LS before creating a JumpKit account - the webhook stores a pending row, and apply-pending-upgrade is called automatically on first login.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
163 · #131 Subscription
check-member-lockouts - actually locks a member when lock_at has passed
Confirms check-member-lockouts sets locked=true on rows where lock_at is in the past.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
164 · #105 Deployment
SSL certificate valid and HTTPS enforced
Confirms that jumpkit.app has a valid SSL certificate and HTTPS is enforced. Cannot be automated from inside the Electron app - the CSP connect-src does not include jumpkit.app, so fetch() is blocked by the browser security policy.

Exec / #ID Category Title & Purpose Result Timestamp
10 · #1 Auth
Session persists after reload
Confirms the user remains authenticated after the app loads. If this fails, the login flow or session storage is broken.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
11 · #2 Auth
currentUser is set
Verifies the local currentUser object is properly populated. This object drives nearly all DB reads/writes - if missing, the entire app will malfunction.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
12 · #3 Auth
Supabase profile loaded
Checks that the user's Supabase profile row was fetched on startup. Role, org_id, and subscription data all live here - missing profile breaks teams, billing, and settings.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
13 · #4 Auth
Subscription status in memory
Ensures subscription_status is present on the in-memory Supabase profile object after login. This is the sole source of truth for feature gating - localStorage is intentionally not used to prevent client-side tampering.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
14 · #5 Auth
Onboarding - checkAndShowOnboarding gated by onboarding_completed
Confirms checkAndShowOnboarding() exists and does NOT show the onboarding modal when onboarding_completed is already true. This is the normal state for existing users.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
15 · #146 Auth
user_sessions row written on login
Confirms that a user_sessions row exists in Supabase for the current user after login.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
16 · #147 Auth
session_token matches sessionStorage
Confirms the session_token stored in Supabase matches what is stored in sessionStorage on this device.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
17 · #6 Database
Parameterized queries - no raw SQL string concatenation
Confirms all DB queries use Supabase JS client (parameterized) or SQLite prepared statements, preventing SQL injection.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
18 · #7 Database
Connection pooling - Supabase REST API used (pooling automatic)
Confirms app uses Supabase REST API (auto-pooled via PgBouncer) not a direct Postgres connection.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
19 · #8 Database
Non-root DB user - app uses authenticated role only
Confirms the app never uses the postgres superuser or service_role. All queries go through authenticated role with RLS enforced.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
20 · #127 Database
Migrations in version control - supabase/migrations/ folder exists
Confirms database migration files are tracked in version control, not applied manually without tracking.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
21 · #9 DB Schema
team_members - lockout columns exist in schema
Confirms the DB migration for the lockout system was applied. The columns locked, lock_at, and lock_notified_2day must exist on team_members or the entire lockout system silently fails.

startPage pref saves and reads back

51 · #31 Jumps

Isolates the core data accessor for jumps. If this returns a non-array, every jump render and loop in the app will crash.

Verifies the column data accessor works. Columns are required to display or add jumps - if this fails, the Jumps page will be empty or crash.

Tests the full create→read→delete lifecycle for a jump. Confirms DB.createJump persists correctly and DB.deleteJump removes it cleanly.

Confirms that archiving a jump correctly removes it from the active list. Catches bugs where archive doesn't persist or the active filter doesn't exclude archived items.

55 · #35 Jumps
Hotkey not duplicated
Ensures no two jumps share a hotkey, which would cause unpredictable behavior when that key is pressed. Catches data corruption from imports or manual edits.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
56 · #36 Jumps
DB.updateJump persists field changes
Confirms that updateJump correctly writes name, URL, and description changes back to the in-memory cache (and SQLite). If this fails, jump edits via the Configure modal will silently discard user changes.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
57 · #37 Jumps
Jump favorite toggle persists
Confirms that marking a jump as a favorite (and unmarking it) correctly updates the in-memory cache. Favorites power the quick-access section - silent failure here would silently break it.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
58 · #38 Jumps
DB.incrementClick increments clickCount
Verifies that opening a jump via DB.incrementClick correctly increments clickCount in cache. Stats, sorting, and the top-used display all depend on this counter being accurate.

59 · #39 Columns
Columns have unique IDs
Guards against duplicate column IDs which would cause jumps to appear in wrong columns or be overwritten during saves.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM

Confirms column ordering is intact so the Jumps page renders columns in the correct left-to-right sequence. Catches issues after drag-reorder or bulk saves.

Ensures the user has a column set up, which is required for adding jumps. If zero columns exist, the Add Jump modal will fail silently.

Confirms the user's role is present on the in-memory Supabase profile object. Role gates org-owner vs team-member views - localStorage is intentionally not used to prevent client-side tampering.

Validates that the core sync function completes without throwing, regardless of team membership state. A crash here would prevent all shared jump propagation.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
105 · #374 Shared Sync
Cleanup - purge ALL test artifacts from Supabase
Sweeps ALL stale test data from Supabase - not just the current run. Finds every team, shared_column, shared_jump, invite, and member row created by any previous test run using the __jk_test_* / __test_* naming convention, and deletes them. Also restores role elevated by test 69.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
106 · #85 Security
DevTools disabled in production build
Ensures DevTools are blocked in packaged builds so users cannot tamper with localStorage (subscription tier/status) or inspect internals.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
107 · #86 Security
All Supabase requests use authenticated session
Confirms that the supabaseClient has an active authenticated session before the app loads data. Unauthenticated data access should not be possible.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
108 · #87 Security
HTTPS enforced - Supabase URL uses HTTPS
Confirms that all Supabase API communication uses HTTPS, not plain HTTP.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
109 · #88 Security
CORS - Edge Functions not called with wildcard origin
Confirms that the app does not rely on wildcard CORS. Edge functions should be locked to jumpkit.app.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
110 · #89 Security
Input sanitization - esc() used for user-generated content
Confirms that user input rendered into the DOM is escaped to prevent XSS attacks.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
111 · #90 Security
Rate limiting - 429 returned on excessive requests (Edge Function config check)
Confirms that rate limiting is configured on Edge Functions. In-memory rate limiter returns 429 after threshold.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
112 · #91 Security
Password hashing - PBKDF2 used (not plain SHA-256)
Confirms that team passwords are hashed with PBKDF2 (strong KDF) and not plain SHA-256.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
113 · #92 Security
Auth tokens have expiry - JWT exp claim present
Confirms that the Supabase JWT session token has an expiry claim (exp) and has not expired.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
114 · #129 Security
No secret API keys in frontend code
Confirms that no service-role keys or secret tokens are exposed in the renderer. Only the safe anon key should be present.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
115 · #94 UI
Dark/light mode toggle works
Confirms the theme attribute is set to a valid value. An invalid or missing theme would cause the CSS variables to fall back incorrectly, breaking the entire visual design.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
116 · #95 UI
Toast function accessible
Verifies the Toast notification system is available. Save, delete, error, and feedback operations all call Toast - if missing, users get no feedback on their actions.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
117 · #96 UI
Modal function accessible
Confirms the Modal system is available globally. Add Jump, Configure Columns, Feedback, and team actions all use Modal - a missing definition would silently break all of them.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
118 · #97 UI
Sidebar nav has items
Ensures the sidebar navigation rendered all its buttons. Fewer than 5 nav items means a page is missing from the nav - users wouldn't be able to reach it.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
119 · #98 UI
CtxMenu is accessible
Confirms the context menu system is initialized. Right-clicking any jump relies on CtxMenu.show/hide - if missing, right-click actions (edit, archive, delete) are broken.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
120 · #99 UI
Jump context menu renders on right-click
Simulates a right-click on a jump and confirms the context menu appears with sufficient items. Directly tests the most common jump management interaction.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
121 · #100 UI
Feedback modal - openFeedbackModal() renders without error
Confirms the feedback modal opens and renders its form fields without throwing.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
122 · #101 Code Quality
No production debug logging
Confirms development logging is not left active in production builds.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
123 · #102 Code Quality
Error handling on async operations - Supabase calls check error object
Confirms that async Supabase calls check the returned error object rather than silently swallowing failures.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
124 · #103 Code Quality
Loading and error states in UI - Toast system functional
Confirms that the Toast notification system (used for loading/error/success states) is present and operational.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
125 · #104 Code Quality
Pagination - list queries have reasonable limits
Warns if list queries fetch unbounded rows. At scale, unlimited queries can cause performance issues.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
126 · #106 Deployment
Firewall / infrastructure - Vercel and Supabase managed (no self-hosted server)
Confirms JumpKit has no self-hosted server that requires manual firewall configuration. Vercel and Supabase handle all infrastructure.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
127 · #107 Deployment
Process manager - N/A for Electron + Vercel + Supabase stack
Confirms no unmanaged background processes are running. For this stack, process management is handled by Vercel/Supabase/OS - PM2 is not required.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
128 · #108 Deployment
Auto-update IPC - onUpdateReady and installUpdate exposed in preload
Confirms preload.js exposes both update IPC bridges. If either is missing, the update banner will never show or the restart button will throw.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
129 · #109 Deployment
Auto-update banner - #updateBanner element exists in DOM and starts hidden
Confirms the update banner HTML element exists in app.html and is initially hidden. If it is missing, no update notification will ever appear.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
130 · #110 Deployment
Auto-update banner - shows when update-ready event fires
Confirms the app.js listener correctly shows #updateBanner when the update-ready IPC event fires. Tests the full renderer-side update notification path.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
131 · #113 Deployment
Export PDF - electronAPI.exportPDF is exposed in preload
Confirms the Electron preload correctly exposes electronAPI.exportPDF so the renderer can trigger PDF generation.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
132 · #140 Deployment
Environment variables - Supabase URL and anon key configured
Confirms that required environment variables (SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY) are set and non-empty. Edge Function secrets cannot be verified from client but client-side vars are checked.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
133 · #162 Deployment
Mac build icon is set to assets/icon.icns
Confirms the Electron build config specifies the correct .icns icon for macOS. An incorrect or missing icon means the installer and app will ship with the wrong icon.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
134 · #163 Deployment
Windows build icon is set to assets/icon.ico
Confirms the Electron build config specifies the correct .ico icon for Windows. Using a PNG instead of .ico degrades icon quality in Explorer, taskbar, and title bar.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
135 · #122 Maintenance
Auto-archive fires correctly and creates notification
Verifies that runAutoArchive() correctly identifies jumps unused past the threshold, archives them in SQLite, and creates an in-app notification. Confirms free-tier users are blocked.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
136 · #200 SQLite
SQLite available — not falling back to localStorage
Confirms better-sqlite3 is compiled for the current Electron ABI and the main process has an open DB connection. A failure here means every save operation is silently broken. Fix: run npx @electron/rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3 from the app directory.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
137 · #201 SQLite
Column write → SQLite round-trip
Verifies that DB.saveColumns actually persists to SQLite by writing a test column then immediately reading it back via the IPC layer (bypassing the in-memory cache). Catches ABI mismatch and write failures silently swallowed by fire-and-forget IPC.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
138 · #202 SQLite
Jump write → SQLite round-trip
Verifies that DB.createJump actually persists to SQLite by writing a test jump then reading it back via the IPC layer. Catches the exact bug where imports rendered in memory but vanished after logout because SQLite was not being written.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
139 · #203 SQLite
saveColumns IPC returns ok:true
Directly calls electronAPI.saveColumns and checks the return value. The import-after-logout bug was caused by this IPC returning {ok:false} silently. This test catches any regression where the SQLite save silently fails.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
140 · #204 SQLite
saveJump IPC returns ok:true
Directly calls electronAPI.saveJump and checks the return value. Catches silent IPC failures that cause jumps to persist in memory but not survive a logout/login cycle.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
141 · #205 SQLite
No orphan personal jumps in SQLite
Verifies that every personal active jump has a valid column ID that exists in SQLite. Orphan jumps cause the Jumps page to appear empty even when Home counts them. This was the final rendering symptom of the SQLite-unavailable bug.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM

send-member-joined - Edge Function returns ok:true
NA · #119 Email
send-member-removed - Edge Function returns ok:true
150 · #144 Email
waitlist-signup - Edge Function call + inbox verification
End-to-end test: automatically calls the waitlist-signup Edge Function and verifies a valid response, then asks you to confirm the email arrived in your inbox. If already on the waitlist (duplicate:true), auto-passes with no inbox check needed.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
151 · #121 Deployment
Export PDF - exports real statistics PDF and opens for human verification
Calls exportStatsPDF() - the real app export function - to generate the actual ROI report PDF from live data. Human verifies the saved file looks correct.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
NA · #123 Maintenance
Auto-backup fires correctly and creates notification
▸Manual (12) 6 Pass6 Skipped
Exec / #ID Category Title & Purpose Result Timestamp
153 · #124 Auth
Sign out clears session
Manually confirms that signing out fully ends the session and prevents access to the app without re-authenticating. Critical for security.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
154 · #148 Auth
Second device login is blocked
Confirms that attempting to log in from a second device while already logged in shows the session conflict modal and blocks entry.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
155 · #149 Auth
Force logout displaces original session
Confirms that when a second device force-logs-out the first, the first device eventually shows the displacement warning and redirects to login.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
NA · #125 Database
Supabase backups - verify plan supports backups
NA · #126 Database
Dev/Prod database separation - single project warning
158 · #155 Account
Export then Import round-trip on new device
End-to-end confirmation that a user can export jumps from one device and import them on another, with all personal jumps transferred correctly.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
159 · #128 Jumps
Jump click launches URL or directory
Manually verifies the core user action - clicking a link jump opens the URL in the browser, and clicking a directory jump opens it in the file explorer.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM
160 · #161 Columns
Configure Columns - Add Column and Remove Column buttons
Confirms the Add Column and Remove Column (trash icon) UI flows work correctly in the Configure Columns modal.
 Jul 1, 11:30 AM

Lemon Squeezy webhook upgrades subscription_status

apply-pending-upgrade - applies upgrade for user who paid before creating account
